summary: Most Indians underestimate what it takes to retire comfortably. In this episode, Sneha Jain, Founder of Wealth Trust, breaks down the essentials of retirement planning for India. From the right investment strategies to managing inflation and rising healthcare costs, we cover what you really need to know.

seo.title: Retirement Planning in India: What You Need to Know Today | Sneha Jain, CEO WealthTrust
seo.description: Most Indians underestimate what it takes to retire comfortably. In this episode, Sneha Jain, Founder of Wealth Trust, breaks down the essentials of

takeaways: Most Indians underestimate what it actually takes to retire comfortably, so the honest first step is facing the real cost of retirement before building any plan.
Starting early is the single biggest advantage you have, because the years you give your money to compound are the ones a late start can never fully buy back.
Your corpus has to be sized against inflation and rising healthcare costs, not just today's expenses, which is why the episode walks through calculating your real retirement needs.
There is no one right product: the conversation covers a mix of mutual funds, EPF, gold and more, and sets realistic return expectations across each rather than chasing one winner.
A retirement plan is not set-and-forget, so reviewing it regularly and balancing life today against the future keeps it honest as your circumstances change.
